---
title: "Homeworks"
---

### Homework Directions

[Homework 1](Homework_Folder/HW1_2026.qmd)

[Homework 2](Homework_Folder/HW2_2026.qmd)

[Homework 3](Homework_Folder/HW3_2026.qmd)

[Homework 4](Homework_Folder/HW4_2026.qmd)

[Term Project](Homework_Folder/Term_Project_2026.qmd)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Data Sets for Homeworks

[bone_healing.tsv](Homework_Folder/bone_healing.tsv)

[flu.tsv](Homework_Folder/flu.tsv)

[igf.tsv](Homework_Folder/igf.tsv)

[knee_injury.csv](Homework_Folder/knee_injury.csv)

[RNAseq_microbiome.csv](Homework_Folder/RNAseq_microbiome.csv)

[scaffold_mechanics.csv](Homework_Folder/scaffold_mechanics.csv)

[nanoparticle_delivery.csv](Homework_Folder/nanoparticle_delivery.csv)
